content_body:
Don't Miss Your Chance To Save!

 

Take advantage of this offer in 2 easy steps:

1. Choose one of the cabins on this page.

2. Call 706-632-2246 and make a reservation for this weekend using the offer code 32715.

 

*This offer is only valid for new reservations for the weekend of March 27th, 2015. The 15% discount applies to the nightly rate.
title: Last Minute Deal (3.23.15)
